title: xenos #3581
definition:
1) a foreigner, a stranger
    1a) alien (from a person or a thing)
    1b) without the knowledge of, without a share in
    1c) new, unheard of
 2) one who receives and entertains another hospitably
    2a) with whom he stays or lodges, a host
nasbUsage:
